features.description: Jaccard overlap between header-aware value tokens, capturing alignment of field-specific content despite reordering.
Jaccard similarity over exact header-to-value pairs, rewarding rows that match on the same field with the same normalized value.
Overlap coefficient on row token sets: intersection size normalized by the smaller set, robust to subset relationships.
Overlap coefficient on normalized value sets: intersection normalized by the smaller set to capture near-containment.
Average of 3-gram and 4-gram character Jaccard on serialized rows, balancing robustness and precision to formatting.
features.code:
def compute_feature(ctx):
    helpers = ctx["helpers"]
    sa = ctx["stats_a"]["serial_text"]
    sb = ctx["stats_b"]["serial_text"]
    j3 = helpers["char_ngram_jaccard"](sa, sb, 3)
    j4 = helpers["char_ngram_jaccard"](sa, sb, 4)
    return helpers["clip01"]((float(j3) + float(j4)) / 2.0)

features.description: Smooth balance similarity of non-empty cell counts: 1 - |a-b|/(a+b), emphasizing comparable sparsity patterns.
Cosine similarity of row embeddings mapped to [0,1] via (cos+1)/2 to stabilize scale.
